case_title: THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER VS. STELLA OKORAH

REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR
